# Skill: Feature Planning

## Purpose
Turn a PO feature request into an actionable architecture-first implementation plan.

## Steps
1. Clarify objective, scope, and constraints.
2. If required information is missing, ask follow-up questions in the originating issue comments instead of recording unresolved questions in the architecture plan.
3. Map impact on existing architecture and contracts.
4. Propose up to 3 solution options.
5. Select one recommended path with rationale.
6. Break delivery into incremental phases.
7. Define objective acceptance criteria.
8. Produce dev-agent prompts.
9. Require technical documentation updates.

## Output
Use the Output Contract in `agents/solution-architect/OUTPUT-CONTRACT.md`.
Summarize issue-thread clarifications in the final plan and reference the issue discussion when relevant.
